sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11328" key="a(palosu/gkritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁπᾰλο-σύγκρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of delicate texture,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σώματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:14:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.14.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
